loan_contract_no.text: เลขสัญญาเงินกู้

combo.loan_contract_no_combo: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as item_code ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as item_desc from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type in ('สช','สส','สห','สน','สร','สฐ','สง') and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} order by begining_of_contract desc

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'sd Month yyyy') as requestm ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date,'Month yyyy') as start_keep_date_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as position ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code
--ที่อยู่ทะเบียนบ้าน ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 6 ) as address_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 8 ) as moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 7 ) as mooban ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 10 ) as soi ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 9 ) as road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 11 ) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 12 ) as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 13 ) as province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 14 ) as postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no,('1')::text, 15 ) as telephone
,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as loan_approve_amount_thai ,(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_intrate(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type)*100)as int_rate ,sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount)::text) as period_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount)::text) as loan_installment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.last_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_contract.last_payment_amount)::text) as last_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'sd Month yyyy') as begining_of_contract_date
,(select marriage_status from sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status where sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status) as marriage_status ,fpa_com_marriage(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as spname ,(select id_card from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as sp_id_card ,to_char(current_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY-HH24:MI:SS')||'-'||sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer as entry_id ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as group_district ,( select sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ) as province_addr
--บันทึกข้อความ ,(select share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_mem where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock ,(select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as principal_balance ,(select sum(req_amount) from sc_lon_m_req_coll where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) as req_amount ,(select si_security_user.user_name from si_security_user where user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer) as entry_name
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส6800799' order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no asc

r_tnma_period_advance_norm_สง_nest.sql:
--select sc_lon_m_contract_keepmth.loan_contract_no, --sc_lon_m_contract_keepmth.effective_date, --sc_lon_m_contract_keepmth.period_last, --sc_lon_m_contract_keepmth.period_payment_amount --from sc_lon_m_contract_keepmth --,sc_lon_m_contract --where 1=1 --and trim(sc_lon_m_contract_keepmth.loan_contract_no) = trim(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no)
SELECT sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 1 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_1 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 2 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_2 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 3 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_3 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 4 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_4 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 5 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_5 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 6 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_6 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 7 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_7 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 8 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_8 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 9 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_9 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 10 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_10 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 11 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_11 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 12 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_12 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 13 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_13 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 14 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_14 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 15 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_15 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 16 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_16 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 17 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_17 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 18 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_18 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 19 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_19 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 20 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_20 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 21 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_21 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 22 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_22 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 23 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_23 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 24 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_24 , sum((CASE tab.row_no WHEN 25 THEN period_payment_amount ELSE '' END)) as seq_no_25
FROM ( select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request_step_pay.effective_date, sc_lon_m_loan_request_step_pay.period_step as period_last, sc_lon_m_loan_request_step_pay.period_payment as period_payment_amount , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_request_step_pay.period_step) AS row_no
from sc_lon_m_loan_request_step_pay ,sc_lon_m_contract
where 1=1 and trim(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) = trim(sc_lon_m_loan_request_step_pay.loan_requestment_no) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'สง6900014' FETCH FIRST 25 ROWS ONLY
) TAB
